raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to check a research-paper excerpt centrally includes testing whether the causal and argumentative chain is coherent.","R1.3":"The excerpt makes empirical claims from benchmark results, so checking whether those claims align with the reported numbers is central.","R1.4":"The artifact contains an explicit first-of-its-kind claim, making novelty assessment a central responsibility.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose, sentence-level clarity and polish are centrally expected.","RX.1":"Any check must disclose uncertainty because the excerpt lacks full paper context, prior-work details, and experimental appendices.","RX.2":"The deployment-ready, binding-constraint, and first-orchestration-substrate claims require active guardrails against overclaiming.","RX.3":"The projection must remain within checking responsibilities and must not perform edits or execute the requested check.","RX.4":"The artifact concerns deployment of LLM agent systems, so avoiding downstream harm from unsupported reliability or deployment claims is active.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability to the specific claims, numbers, and wording present in the provided excerpt."}}

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check a research-paper excerpt centrally includes testing whether the causal and argumentative chain is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The excerpt makes empirical claims from benchmark results, so checking whether those claims align with the reported numbers is central.
rationale.R1.4: The artifact contains an explicit first-of-its-kind claim, making novelty assessment a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose, sentence-level clarity and polish are centrally expected.
rationale.RX.1: Any check must disclose uncertainty because the excerpt lacks full paper context, prior-work details, and experimental appendices.
rationale.RX.2: The deployment-ready, binding-constraint, and first-orchestration-substrate claims require active guardrails against overclaiming.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must remain within checking responsibilities and must not perform edits or execute the requested check.
rationale.RX.4: The artifact concerns deployment of LLM agent systems, so avoiding downstream harm from unsupported reliability or deployment claims is active.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability to the specific claims, numbers, and wording present in the provided excerpt.
